beds.title: Music Candidate 1 — Euphoric Heights
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs dance track candidate. Progressive house / trance direction: fast, four-on-the-floor, piano, synth bass, uplifting, euphoric, instrumental. Strongest first listen for the Equinox-style dance bed.

beds.title: Music Candidate 2 — Sunrise Vibe
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs dance track candidate. Dance-pop / tropical house direction: instrumental, upbeat, feel-good, rhythmic piano, four-on-the-floor. Brighter and more commercial.

beds.title: Music Candidate 3 — Festival Euphoria
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs dance track candidate. Progressive house / uplifting trance direction: energetic, euphoric, melodic, driving, four-on-the-floor. Bigger festival lift.

beds.title: Music Candidate 4 — Corporate Groove
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs dance track candidate. Uplifting house / dance-pop / funky commercial direction. More brand-safe and less nightclub-heavy.

beds.title: Foley Reference — Deep Magnetic Recumbent Bike Whir
beds.note: Existing bike layer only: deeper smooth electronic resistance whir with no percussive click. This should be tucked under the approved music in final mix.
